1. Today’s Activities
    1. 1. Download the Exercise Files
    2. 2. Review the Slides
    3. 3. Watch the Lecture Video(s)

What even are computers. What’s going on inside them? What’s the command line? I thought you said Python was cool?

Let’s tackle some of these things by demoing some basics of the “command line,” introudcing PIP (a package installer for Python), and then do some fun stuff with some cool packages!

Today's Activities

For today, please do the following:

1. Download the Exercise Files

Exercise Files

2. Review the Slides

  1. PIP and the Command Line

3. Watch the Lecture Video(s)
